detailed_review:
Your Go-To Marketplace for Trusted Home Services

Urban Company (formerly UrbanClap) has revolutionized the way we access home services. From salon treatments at home and relaxing massages to deep cleaning, plumbing, and AC repairs, Urban Company connects you with certified, background-verified professionals right at your doorstep. It eliminates the hassle of searching for reliable local technicians, offering a standardized, high-quality experience every single time.

Why Millions Trust Urban Company

The platform's success lies in its rigorous screening and training programs for service providers. Users love the convenience of booking a service in under a minute, transparent pricing, and the assurance of insurance coverage for damages during service delivery. With a robust customer support system and user-friendly interface, it has become an indispensable app for modern households.

How to Maximize Your ₹100 Sign-Up Bonus

By signing up through the exclusive referral link https://m.urbancompany.com/ImbW/tz2slvwr, new users instantly receive a ₹100 voucher. To get the most out of this reward, plan your booking ahead of time. Since the voucher is valid for 4 weeks, we recommend scheduling a routine service—like an appliance check-up, a quick salon session, or home cleaning—right after registering to ensure you don't let this free credit go to waste.
steps: Click on the referral link: https://m.urbancompany.com/ImbW/tz2slvwr to go directly to the Urban Company app download page.
Download and install the Urban Company app on your iOS or Android device.
Open the app and register a new account using your mobile number.
Verify your account with the OTP sent to your phone.
The ₹100 discount voucher will be automatically applied to your account and can be viewed under the 'Offers' or 'Wallet' section.
Select your desired service, add it to your cart, and the ₹100 discount will be applied automatically at checkout.

faq.question: How do I claim the ₹100 Urban Company sign-up bonus?
faq.answer: You must download the Urban Company app using the referral link (https://m.urbancompany.com/ImbW/tz2slvwr) and register a new account. The ₹100 voucher will be credited automatically.

faq.question: When does the Urban Company referral voucher expire?
faq.answer: The ₹100 referral voucher is valid for exactly 4 weeks (28 days) from the date of your successful registration. Make sure to use it before it expires!

faq.question: Do I need to manually enter a referral code?
faq.answer: No manual code entry is required. As long as you install the app directly via the provided referral link, the reward will be automatically linked to your new account.

faq.question: Can I use the ₹100 voucher on any service?
faq.answer: Yes, the voucher is generally applicable to all major home services offered on the Urban Company app, including salon, cleaning, repairs, and spa treatments, subject to minimum order values if applicable.
